headline: Jabil’s Second Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Announcement Set
summary: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla., March 04, 2026--Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) today announced it will release its second quarter of fiscal year 2026 financials on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, before the market opens.

headline: XRP Could Hit $1,000 Under Full Institutional Adoption Scenario, Commentators Claim
summary: XRP may have the potential to reach four-digit price levels under a full institutional adoption framework, according to commentary from the latest Paul Barron podcast featuring Jake Claver. XRP's Regulatory Position The discussion emphasized that Ripple strengthened XRP's legal standing...

headline: FN Jumps 25% in a Month: Is There More Room for the Stock to Grow?
summary: Fabrinet stock has surged 24.9% in a month as HPC revenues scale, telecom/DCI demand accelerates and next-gen 800ZR nears production, boosting growth outlook.

headline: Grant Cardone Says 'You Cannot Fix The Housing Problem In America' — Predicts The U.S. Becomes A 'Renter Nation' As Homeownership Stays Unaffordable
summary: Money talks. Housing groans. Real estate investor Grant Cardone recently made it clear he doesn't see relief coming anytime soon during an interview on the "The Wealthy Way Podcast." "Because this country will become a renter nation. I mean, you...
